hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty"); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0'
bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git push --force|git push -f"; then echo "Force push blocked" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty"); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "^\.env|\.env\.local|\.env\.production"; then echo ".env file edit blocked" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'
